title: The Ark
excerpt: Don’t throw away your old camp stuff! We are collecting Camp Barney history and preserving it for future generations. contentHtml:
Don’t throw away your old camp stuff! We are collecting Camp Barney history and preserving it for future generations. Just as we put the sacred Torah scrolls in the ark, Barney’s Ark is a place to capture and archive our sacred memories from Camp Barney.

Please join us in collecting and preserving Camp history by sharing your memories with us – photos, stories, t-shirts, brochures. Whatever you’ve got! Visit The Ark to look around at all the great memories we’ve collected and stick around to upload some of your own.
contentText:
Don’t throw away your old camp stuff! We are collecting Camp Barney history and preserving it for future generations. Just as we put the sacred Torah scrolls in the ark, 
Barney’s Ark
 is a place to capture and archive our sacred memories from Camp Barney.

Please join us in collecting and preserving Camp history by sharing your memories with us – photos, stories, t-shirts, brochures. Whatever you’ve got! Visit 
The Ark
 to look around at all the great memories we’ve collected and stick around to upload some of your own.
